description: Sequence recommendation - 50000 users, 2156 items, cold-start problem

experiments.notes: Markov transitions + co-occurrence + frequency + last-to-target mapping
SASRec self-attention model. CPU training, underfitting. Much worse than heuristic.
Hybrid: warm users use heuristic, cold users use user feature cosine similarity
Key insight: user frequency signal is extremely strong. freq_weight optimized from 0.2 to 1000.
last_to_target weight optimized from 2.0 to 200.0. Major improvement.
